name: updel_inmember
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 (D-155 control): update-then-DELETE of an already-IN-fold member in one epoch nets a REAL membership change -> both sides fire the post-delete value (5 -> 0). Contrast xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_*: when the UPDATE ITSELF brings the member in, the oracle's per-entry flush fires the net-zero value and the engine's batched staging compensates silently (the open residual).
